## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] README / docs updated when user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] `nuget-resolution-guard.schema.json` updated when config surface changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for release-visible or breaking changes
- [ ] `THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.md` updated when dependencies changed
- [ ] Translation follow-up issue created when English/Japanese docs were not updated together
- [ ] Temporary fix follow-up issue created when applicable
